message:
fix: use Node 24 (npm 11) for OIDC trusted-publisher auth + add architecture diagram

npm 10 (Node 22) doesn't support tokenless OIDC publishing — provenance
signs but PUT returns 404. Node 24 ships npm 11 which supports it
(matching vectorjson). Also adds drawmode architecture diagram to docs.

files.patch:
@@ -65,12 +65,13 @@ jobs:
       - name: Test
         run: pnpm test
 
-      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+      - name: Setup Node.js
+        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
-          node-version: 22
+          node-version: '24'
           registry-url: 'https://registry.npmjs.org'
 
-      - name: Publish to npm (OIDC provenance)
+      - name: Publish to npm (OIDC)
         run: npm publish --provenance --access public
 
   create-tag:

@@ -41,6 +41,10 @@ Anywhere `WebAssembly.Memory` is available:
 - Cloudflare Workers and Durable Objects
 - Node.js, Deno, Bun
 
+## Architecture
+
+![zerobuf architecture](./architecture.svg)
+
 ## Current state
 
 - JS library with defineProperty accessors (V8-optimized reads, ~8M ops/sec)

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "zerobuf",
-  "version": "0.1.2",
+  "version": "0.1.3",
   "description": "Structured binary layout over WebAssembly.Memory — zero-copy JS/WASM data exchange",
   "type": "module",
   "packageManager": "pnpm@10.21.0",
